name: Homemade Graham Cracker Crust Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Process 6 or 7 graham crackers at a time in a blender (or food processor fitted with the metal blade) until fine crumb stage is reached.
2. Pour crumbs into a large bowl; repeat with remaining graham crackers.
3. Stir in sugar and cinnamon.
4. Transfer mixture to a container with a 10-cup capacity and a tight fitting lid.
5. Seal container; label with date and contents.
6. Store in a cool, dry place. Use within 6 months.
Makes about 9 cups of Homemade Graham Cracker Crust Mix.
